title: Catalog
description: A table/metadata catalog (Iceberg REST, Hive Metastore, Glue, ...) as a provider-agnostic noun. spec.engine is an open discriminator pairing with an engine-named nested block, exactly like Source — Nessie is one engine behind the Catalog abstraction, never a shape of its own.

engine.description: Open-ended catalog engine discriminator (nessie, hive, glue, ...). Names the sibling engine-specific block; the realizing provider must declare it in SupportedCatalogEngines().

providerRef.description: The catalog-capable Provider realizing this catalog. Required unless external.

external.description: The catalog service lives outside the platform; Datascape never creates or deletes it.

connectionRef.description: A Connection (preferred) or SecretReference describing how to reach an external catalog. Required when external.

additionalProperties.description: Engine-specific block named after spec.engine (e.g. nessie: {defaultBranch}).
